name: Furry Road Trip
description:
"I drive." -Ryan Gosling, Drive (2011)

You are on a road trip in a world of anthropomorphic animal people...or furries, if you prefer; for what reason, and to what end, is all up to you. But one thing is for sure: it's a trip you will never forget.

Inspired by the Furry hotel bot by @Itchi. It's a great bot, love it, but it's rather limited in scope of location. From the continent-spanning adventure to a simple jaunt down to the grocery, this bot is more aimed for people who crave variety of location for their smut...and don't mind many, many "intimate" encounters in the backseat. Or the front seat. Or the hood. Or the trunk. Or...well, you get the point.

Admittedly, this bot will not give you a very detailed scenario to begin with; that is because this bot serves as a jumping off point for many different encounters of your choice. Fancy a "meeting" with a cute cat woman in the local library? Can't keep your hands off the hunky wolf sitting next to you at the long-awaited football game you went to? Or hey, how about a quickie with a rat behind the dumpsters at Denny's? Have more vanilla tastes and would rather pair with a human? Maybe you're content with simply recreating the events portrayed in the image provided? If any of these scenarios sound appealing to you, then the world's your oyster. If not, then that's fine too; a big noggin like yours should have no problem dreaming up the perfect fantasy.

So go on, big shot; paint the town red (or white) and show these furries who's the boss...unless you're the submissive type, but hey, no judgement here. Or you can be funny and be a serial killer, or a deviant, or Sakuna, or whatever else makes you happy, champ. Now take your vehicle of choice and go into the wide world beyond our own.
creator: TWAce
